mods.name: SalJam_Dangerous_Horizons_QOL
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: QOL changes mainly based on Dangerous Horizons. Added a two OP backpacks and envirosuits. Higher battery Lithium tools, higher capacity oil processing, added raptor talent, added recipe to create Uranium rods.

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Lightened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 6 inventory slots, 1 heavy slot, is 10% quicker and uses less fuel

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Hauler
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 18 inventory slots, 3 heavy slots, but is slower by 10%

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Strengthened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots and 2 heavy slots
